title: J6Flag Function
parameters: point	Optional.  Point expression.  If point is omitted, then the J6Flag setting of the current robot position is returned.
description:
J6Flag Function

J6Flag Function

Returns the J6Flag attribute of a point.
see_also:
Elbow, Hand, Wrist, J4Flag, J6Flag Statement

J6Flag Function Example

Print J6Flag(pick)

Print J6Flag(P1)

Print J6Flag

Print J6Flag(P1 + P2)
examples:
Print J6Flag(pick)

Print J6Flag(P1)

Print J6Flag

Print J6Flag(P1 + P2)
